---
title: "Cheong Jian Wei"
toc-location: right
about:
  id: about-me
  template: solana
  image: media/me_crop.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: contact
      href: contact.qmd
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: cv
      href: cv.qmd
    - text: <img alt="ORCID logo" src="https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png" width="16" height="16" /> 0000-0001-7114-7825
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7114-7825
listing:
  - id: recent-post-listing
    contents: posts
    type: table
    fields: [date, title, reading-time]
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
---

::: {#about-me}
I am Jian Wei, a Physics PhD student in Nanyang Technological University, Singapore.

Research interest in quantum information and quantum thermodynamics.
Currently working on quantum compositions of channels and information ratchet system.

Plays with Linux and does programming for fun.

I believe in efficiency of workflow.
Everything should be as painless as possible, doing more with less.
:::

---

#### **Recent posts**

::: {#recent-post-listing}
:::
[see more](posts.qmd)

---

#### **List of publications**

1. L. Y. Chew, A. Pradana, L. He, and **J. W. Cheong**, *Stochastic thermodynamics of finite-tape information ratchet*, [European Physical Journal Special Topics (2023)](https://doi.org/10.1140/epjs/s11734-023-00994-3).
1. **J. W. Cheong**, A. Pradana, and L. Y. Chew, *Effects of non-Markovianity on daemonic ergotropy in the quantum switch*, [Physical Review A, 108(1), 012201 (2023)](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevA.108.012201).
1. L. He, **J. W. Cheong**, A. Pradana, and L. Y. Chew, *Effects of correlation in an information ratchet with finite tape*, [Physical Review E, 107(2), 024130 (2023)](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.107.024130).
1. **J. W. Cheong**, A. Pradana, and L. Y. Chew, *Communication advantage of quantum compositions of channels from non-Markovianity*, [Physical Review A, 106(5), 052410 (2022)](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevA.106.052410).
1. L. He, A. Pradana, **J. W. Cheong**, and L. Y. Chew, *Information processing second law for an information ratchet with finite tape*, [Physical Review E, 105(5), 054131 (2022)](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.105.054131).
